title: Savory Crunch German Maple Stir-fry
description: A savory and silky German dish featuring maple syrup as the main ingredient to help cure a hangover, this vegetarian-friendly stir-fry is both comforting and delicious.

ingredients.name: chicken breast
ingredients.notes: ensure well-cooked to prevent any risk of bacterial contamination

ingredients.name: cooking spray
ingredients.amount: optional, for greasing pan if needed

instructions: Heat a wok or large skillet with peanut oil over medium-high heat. Add green onions and minced garlic; sauté until fragrant.
Add sliced chicken, shiitake mushrooms, bell peppers, and maple syrup to the pan. Stir-fry for about 5 minutes until the vegetables are slightly tender and chicken is cooked through.
Add soy sauce and ginger root, continuing to stir-fry for another minute or two until flavors meld together. Season with salt if needed.
Transfer the mixture into a baking dish that has been sprayed with cooking spray. Bake in preheated oven for about 10-15 minutes, until the vegetables are fully cooked and slightly crisp.
Serve hot as a side dish or main course. Enjoy this comforting German Maple Stir-fry to help cure hangovers.
